commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `sudo` to the apt system tools list, removes it from the Ubuntu test image, verifies it after the playbook run, and adjusts release-mode pnpm PATH/idempotency handling.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection plus the linked Debian 13 report gives a high-confidence path: current main writes and validates `/etc/sudoers.d/{{ openclaw_user }}` while the earlier Linux package list does not install `sudo`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed; the latest PR head has no blocking review findings and can continue through automerge or maintainer merge gates.

target.title: Install sudo before writing scoped sudoers config
target.body:
## Summary
- Install `sudo` in the Debian/Ubuntu prerequisite package set before the role writes `/etc/sudoers.d/{{ openclaw_user }}`.
- Keep the existing scoped OpenClaw sudoers policy and `/usr/sbin/visudo` validation intact.
- Update the Ubuntu test image and verification so sudo is provided by the playbook, not preinstalled in the image.

Closes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw-ansible/issues/20

## Validation
- `ansible-playbook playbook.yml --syntax-check`
- `ansible-playbook tests/verify.yml --syntax-check`
- `bash tests/run-tests.sh ubuntu2404`

## Notes
Reported by @e-minguez in #20, with additional Debian sudo package context from @chxmxii.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: issue-openclaw-openclaw-ansible-20
- Source PRs: none
- Credit: Source report from @e-minguez in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw-ansible/issues/20.; Comment confirmation from @chxmxii that sudo is not installed by default on Debian systems.; Do not edit CHANGELOG.md; preserve release-note context in the PR body.
- Validation: ansible-playbook playbook.yml --syntax-check; ansible-playbook tests/verify.yml --syntax-check; bash tests/run-tests.sh ubuntu2404
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.

fish notes: reasoning high; reviewed against 8c805dd0b2ee.
